text: If it rains, we ___ at home.
explanation: Type 1 (Real Life): Das Ereignis ist in der Zukunft möglich. If + Simple Present -> will-Future.

text: If I won the lottery, I ___ the world.
explanation: Type 2 (Dreams): Irrealis der Gegenwart. If + Simple Past -> would + Infinitiv.

text: If you had studied, you ___ the exam.
explanation: Type 3 (Regrets): Irrealis der Vergangenheit. If + Past Perfect -> would have + Past Participle.
